Bitcoin's Bullish Signals: These 3 Key Metrics Indicate Potential Upswing, Says Research Firm
data.description: Market intelligence firm Santiment has identified three key metrics suggesting a potential bullish move for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC).

data.title: Measles Cases Surge 5x In US In A Week, CDC Reports: Outbreak Primarily Originating From A Texas County
data.description: The U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) has reported a dramatic increase in measles cases across the nation.

data.title: Bill Gates Has A Warning For The Next Generation, Says Be 'Very Afraid' Of These 4 Issues
data.description: Bill Gates has outlined critical challenges for future generations, emphasizing the importance of addressing bioterrorism, climate change, and artificial intelligence.

data.title: Will Elon Musk's Tesla Team Up With Uber To Roll Out Robotaxis? CEO Dara Khosrowshahi Spills The Beans
data.description: Uber Technologies Inc. (NYSE: UBER) CEO, Dara Khosrowshahi, stated that Elon Musk has no plans to integrate Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA)'s forthcoming robotaxis into Uber's platform.
